segments.text: Larynx really is the one who needs to be taking damage here
segments.original_text: どちらかというとダメージ取りに行かないといけないのはラリックス側ですからね

segments.text: And I suppose it's fine to wait now, Masa
segments.original_text: そしてさすがに今は待ってもいいだろうマサ

segments.text: It's basically reloading that diamond setup again, though
segments.original_text: ダイヤ装備をもう一度リロードする形ではありますが

segments.text: No telling how many more times that setup can get exposed
segments.original_text: もういくつダイヤ装備を掘られても限らない

full_text: Larynx really is the one who needs to be taking damage here. And I suppose it's fine to wait now, Masa. It's basically reloading that diamond setup again, though. No telling how many more times that setup can get exposed. It just came through naturally.

corrections.corrected: 掘られてもたまらない
